title: Bsky Gays
description: Official Modpack for BskyMC. Featured mods include Create, the RPG Series, Macaw's series, Terralith, and Biomes O' Plenty.
body:
This modpack is to be used with the Bsky Gays modded Minecraft server. Enjoy the beautiful terrain generated by Biomes O' Plemty and Terralith. Build fierce machinery with the Create mod and its many add-ons (Deco, Slice & Dice and Steam 'n' Rails). Paint the world in drag with over 15 decoration mods.

![A cozy living room with an array of furniture and decorations.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DKJK9Dco/images/22489393314e5d1ce1ef22d41887a7db08a9d8f7.jpeg)

Optional resource and shader packs are included in the versions not labeled with -server

Access to the server is invite only and you must be a member of the Discord server to be whitelisted. This modpack can be used for both singleplayer and multiplayer.
